center.name: 博戈斯洛夫島
center.summary: 博戈斯洛夫島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-legged kittiwake，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in the Pribilof Islands, Bogoslof Island, and Buldir Island in the Bering Sea off the coast of Alaska, and the Commander Islands, Russia, and spends the winter at sea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds in the Pribilof Islands, Bogoslof Island, and Buldir Island in the Bering Sea off the coast of Alaska, and the Commander Islands, Russia, and spends the winter at sea
